basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 82 Professor, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ESIC Medical College and Hospital, Namkum, Ranchi, Jharkhand - under Employees' State Insurance Corporation (Ministry of Labour & Employment, Govt. of India)
basic_details.total_vacancies: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Senior Resident
basic_details.job_location: ESIC Medical College and Hospital, Purulia Road, Namkum, Ranchi – 834010, Jharkhand
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Medical College Ranchi is recruiting 82 Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident posts including Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, and Senior Resident across 25 departments on a contractual basis with NMC-prescribed medical qualifications, last date 12 June 2026.

application_fee.details: Note: Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

qualification.details: Educational Qualifications: As per National Medical Commission (NMC, erstwhile MCI) guidelines dated 30.06.2025. | Age Limit (as on date of interview): | Age relaxation will be given as per prevailing norms of Govt. of India (GOI) for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwD/Ex-Servicemen. | Important eligibility notes: | All candidates must have up-to-date Medical Registration with NMC / State Medical Council with all post-MBBS/MD/MS qualifications. Candidates without updated registration must submit copy of "Applied for document(s)" to the concerned authority at the time of interview. Candidates working in Govt./Autonomous/Statutory Institutions should preferably produce NOC at the time of interview; if not available immediately, copy of "application for issuance of NOC" must be submitted. Private practice of any kind is strictly prohibited. Selected candidates cannot simultaneously work as Teaching Faculty in any other Hospital/Medical College.

selection_process: Stage 1 Scrutiny of application and documents
Stage 2 Interview before the Selection Board based on academic credentials and performance
Offer of Appointment Communicated through email only

Note: Mere submission of application does not confer any right to the candidate to be eligible for interview unless they report on the scheduled date and time with all required documents. Interview opportunities are on a provisional basis subject to detailed scrutiny of eligibility criteria.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted in the prescribed format only. Incomplete applications or applications in any other format will be summarily rejected. A separate application must be submitted for each post.
Prepare application in the prescribed format.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents (Sl. No. a to m as listed above).
Attach Demand Draft of ₹500/- (if applicable) with the application form.
Submit application preferably by Email to: [email protected] (recommended for speedy delivery).
Alternatively, send by Speed Post or Hand Delivery to: The Dean, ESIC Medical College and Hospital, Purulia Road, Namkum, Ranchi – 834010, Jharkhand.
Application must reach by 12-06-2026. Applications received after the last date will not be entertained.
Superscribe the envelope (if sending by post): "Application for the post of ______ (Department: ________), Advertisement No. 04 of 2026"

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Medical College Ranchi Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 12 June 2026. Applications should reach the office of the Dean, ESIC Medical College and Hospital, Namkum, Ranchi by this date. Submission by email is strongly recommended for speedy delivery. Applications received after the last date will not be entertained.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ESIC Medical College Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 82 vacancies are available — Professor (10), Associate Professor (17), Assistant Professor (15), and Senior Resident (40) — across 25 departments including Anaesthesiology, Medicine, Surgery, Paediatrics, Radiology, OBG, Orthopaedics, Medical Oncology, and others. Vacancies are provisional and may increase or decrease.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Teaching Faculty at ESIC Medical College Ranchi 2026?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration is: Professor — ₹1,23,100/- per month (Level 13 of 7th CPC); Associate Professor — ₹78,800/- per month (Level 12 of 7th CPC); Assistant Professor — ₹67,700/- per month (Level 11 of 7th CPC); and Senior Resident — ₹67,700/- per month (Level 11 of 7th CPC), plus other allowances as applicable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the contract duration for ESIC Medical College Ranchi Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The contractual engagement is for 1 year, extendable every year up to a maximum of 3 years subject to satisfactory performance, or till the joining of the regular incumbent, whichever is earlier. The maximum tenure shall not exceed attainment of 70 years of age. There is no claim for regularisation of service.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for ESIC Medical College Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: SC/ST candidates, Female candidates, Defence Ex-Servicemen, and PH candidates are exempt from the application fee. All other categories must pay ₹500/- through a Demand Draft in favour of ESIC Saving Fund A/c No.-2, payable at Namkum, to be submitted along with the application form. Fees once paid will not be refunded.

faq.question: Q6. What are the tentative interview dates for ESIC Medical College Ranchi Teaching Faculty 2026?
faq.answer: The tentative interview dates are 15-06-2026 or 16-06-2026 (Third week of June 2026). The exact date along with the list of candidates and departments will be published on www.esic.gov.in/recruitments/ and communicated directly to candidates via email after scrutiny of documents submitted by the closing date

faq.question: Q7. Is private practice allowed during the contractual period at ESIC Medical College Ranchi?
faq.answer: No. Private practice of any kind is strictly prohibited during the contractual engagement. Selected candidates will not be allowed to work simultaneously as Teaching Faculty in any other Hospital or Medical College. Breach of this condition will result in termination of appointment and initiation of proceedings with NMC/SMC for cancellation of Registration Certificate.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for ESIC Medical College Ranchi Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies required: Class-X marksheet/certificate (date of birth), MBBS marksheets/degree certificate, PG (MD/MS/DNB) marksheets/degree certificate, EWS/OBC/SC/ST/PwD certificate (Central Govt. format), passport size photograph, NMC/State Medical Council Registration Certificate (updated), proof of publications, experience certificates, ICMR/NMC bio-medical research completion certificate (if any), NMC Basic Medical Education Workshop certificate (if any), Relieving/NOC from employer (if applicable), Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, and Demand Draft (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the security deposit requirement for ESIC Medical College Ranchi 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates must submit a non-interest bearing security deposit of ₹30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand) in the form of a Demand Draft in favour of 'ESIC Saving Fund Account No.2' payable at Namkum at the time of joining. This amount is refundable after successful completion of the contract upon production of a 'No Dues Certificate'.

faq.question: Q10. Can retired employees or pensioners apply for ESIC Medical College Ranchi Teaching Faculty 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Retired employees/pensioners may apply and if engaged, they may be allowed to draw total pay without any deduction. This is not treated as re-employment under CCS (Fixation of Pay of Re-employed Pensioner) Orders, 1986. They can continue to draw their pension and dearness relief on pension during the period of contractual engagement.
